ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "school_mascot" TEXT /* School mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., team, individual) */,
  "is_team_sport" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sport is a team sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport related to the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., championship, regular) */,
  "is_trackable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is trackable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event for which the record is set */,
  "current_holder" TEXT /* Name of the current record holder */,
  "record_value" INTEGER /* Value of the record */,
  "date_record_set" TEXT /* Date when the record was set */,
  "record_description" TEXT /* Description of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the athlete belongs to */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the athlete graduated */,
  "position" TEXT /* Athlete's position in the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the coach works at */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_history" (
  "record_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record history entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record associated with this history entry */,
  "previous_holder" TEXT /* Name of the previous record holder */,
  "previous_record_value" INTEGER /* Previous value of the record */,
  "date_record_broken" TEXT /* Date when the record was broken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_history_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_records" (
  "athlete_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete-record combination */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete who holds the record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record held by the athlete */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete set the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_records_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_records_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_athletes" (
  "coach_athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach-athlete combination */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_athletes_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_comments" (
  "record_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_comments_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)
